generated_oml:
instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03m³ air volume"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed with dimensions 214×214×3mm"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with airflow 0.02m³/s"
]

instance TemperatureSensorInternalHot : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal hot point (measuring -55°C to +125°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensorInternalCold : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal cold point (measuring -55°C to +125°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensorExternal : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for external room temperature (measuring -55°C to +125°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of a styrofoam insulated container (0.03m³ air volume), heatbed (214×214×3mm), fan (airflow 0.02m³/s), three DS18S20 1-Wire temperature sensors (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C), Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control, and power supply."
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensorInternalHot, TemperatureSensorInternalCold, TemperatureSensorExternal, RaspberryPi4ModelB, PCB, PowerSupply
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorInternalHot, TemperatureSensorInternalCold, TemperatureSensorExternal
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Scipy
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AMQP-based message broker for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ModelCalibrationService
]

instance Scipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python package for non-linear least squares calibration and thermal model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService, TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance RaspberryPiGPIOControl : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GPIO control for Raspberry Pi 4 Model B"
    DTDFVocab:enables BangBangControlService
]

instance DS18S20SensorLibraries : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire communication libraries for DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ModelCalibrationService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters: C_air, G_box validated through temperature uniformity experiments and experimental data comparison"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Scipy
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box validated through temperature uniformity experiments and experimental data comparison"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Scipy
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction via dynamic thermal models (Model A and B) and simulations for predictive analysis and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control logic for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides BangBangControlAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Temperature predictions from DT models for operational control"
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters from calibration for improved prediction accuracy"
]

instance BangBangControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control decisions for heating duration H and waiting duration C parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends heating/fan control commands to RabbitMQ server; low-level driver consumes these messages to actuate MOSFET-driven heatbed and fan via Raspberry Pi GPIO, with safe protocol enforcement for operational safety."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of PT hardware (incubator components), DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver, thermal models), and communication flow where PT sensor data feeds into DT models via RabbitMQ, and DT control commands drive PT actuators through the same channel."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated by comparing predicted temperatures with experimental data; residual error minimized via Scipy optimization; assumptions (e.g., uniform temperature distribution, heat transfer) tested through sensor placement experiments and voltage-adjusted fan tests."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server (AMQP protocol) deployed on Raspberry Pi for synchronous communication; PT components (sensors/actuators) interact with DT via message queues, with low-level driver and controller listening to RabbitMQ topics for data/command exchange."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server, controller, and low-level driver hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B; all DT components deployed on-premises with no cloud infrastructure mentioned."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol implemented in low-level driver to maintain operational safety; no specific cybersecurity measures or remote operation safety protocols detailed."
]
